hero.headline:
Developer focused on
performance and infrastructure
hero.subhead: Robust solutions to scale your business: from secure cloud infrastructures to applications with millisecond responses.
about.title: About me
about.bio: I am a systems administrator and developer specialized in building, scaling, and protecting web applications. My focus isn't just writing code, but ensuring your application handles traffic spikes, remains secure, and performs blazingly fast.
about.focus.title: What I do
about.focus.desc: I transform unstable and slow infrastructures into high-availability environments, bridging cutting-edge development with rigorous server administration.
about.skills.infra.title: Infrastructure
about.skills.backend.title: Backend
about.skills.perf.title: Deploy & Performance
about.skills.perf.items: CI/CD, Optimized Web Servers, Caching Server
about.skills.email.title: Email / Deliverability
how.title: How I work
how.perf.title: Absolute Performance
how.perf.desc: I hate slow loading times. I configure advanced caching and modern web servers to ensure your app responds in milliseconds.
how.sec.title: Security & Hardening
how.sec.desc: Bulletproof architectures, process isolation, and rigorous firewall configurations to keep your data secure and private.
how.scale.title: Scalability
how.scale.desc: Prepared for growth. Infrastructure scaled and designed so it won't crash when your traffic spikes.
projects.title: Success Cases
projects.1.title: E-commerce Optimization
projects.1.problem: Online store constantly crashing during marketing campaigns with high response times.
projects.1.solution: Full migration to a custom-provisioned VPS with optimized NGINX, Redis-backed heavy caching, and database separation.
projects.1.result: 40% reduction in TTFB (Time to First Byte) and 100% uptime recorded during the latest Black Friday.
projects.2.title: B2B Analytics Dashboard
projects.2.problem: Very slow data processing freezing the user interface during heavy reporting.
projects.2.solution: Refactored heavy SQL queries, implemented background jobs, and in-memory result caching.
projects.2.result: Reports now load in under 2 seconds, drastically improving user retention on the platform.
cta.title: Ready to scale your project?
cta.subhead: Let's build something fast, secure, and highly scalable together.
resume.professional.info.title: Linux System Administrator | Hosting & Infrastructure | DNS, Email & Cloud Support
resume.professional.summary.title: Professional Summary
resume.professional.summary.text: Linux System Administrator with 3+ years of experience managing hosting environments, Linux servers, DNS infrastructure and email systems. Experienced in troubleshooting production infrastructure, managing WordPress migrations and cloud servers. Strong background in hosting operations, server administration and infrastructure support for production environments.
